justification: All pass criteria met: conflict between 100ms consistency and 30s CDN TTL explicitly named; all three agents' positions attributed (Bird=100ms rule, MJ=30s CDN for scalability, Pippen=CDN required for load); escalation with 4 concrete and distinct resolution paths (exceeds the 3 minimum); no brief produced asking Shaq to implement both constraints simultaneously.

observations.text: Conflict description is precise and quantified — '300x slower than the domain requirement' makes the incompatibility unmistakable
Four distinct resolution paths provided, each with clear tradeoffs and ownership assignments for validation
Correctly attributes Pippen's independent confirmation of the conflict rather than treating it as just an operational concern
Recommendation section adds value by narrowing options and identifying the clarification Bird must provide
Low confidence level (35) is well-calibrated — Magic correctly recognizes it cannot resolve this without product/domain input
No implementation brief produced — output is purely escalation, which is the correct behavior
